channel.title: Gigguk
channel.description: Just a guy who likes to talk about Anime and has been doing it for way too long.
channel.itunes:author: Gigguk
channel.itunes:subtitle: Gigguk
channel.itunes:summary: Just a guy who likes to talk about Anime and has been doing it for way too long.

item.title: Anime Doesn't Get Better Than This.
item.description:
Girls' Frontline 2: EXILIUM's limited time event Aphelion is here! Check it out today and claim a bunch of free rewards: https://sunborn.onelink.me/fxKG/pc81Gigguk #GirlsFrontline2Exilium #gfl2exilium
Follow Girls' Frontline 2: EXILIUM on their socials for all the latest updates: - Official Site: https://gf2exilium.sunborngame.com/ - X (Twitter): https://x.com/GFL2EXILIUM_EN - Discord: https://discord.com/invite/gfl2 - Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/GirlsFrontline2ExiliumEn - YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@GFL2EXILIUM
Today, we're talking about a show I think could become a modern classic. Orb: On the Movements of the Earth
Edited by: Abhi https://twitter.com/BakaShift https://www.youtube.com/@REVELHOUSE
Patreon: http://www.Patreon.com/Gigguk -------------------------------------------------------------------------- Follow me on Twitter: http://twitter.com/GiggukAZ Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/giggukaz/ I Stream on Twitch: http://twitch.tv/Gigguk
item.itunes:author: Gigguk
item.itunes:subtitle: Anime Doesn't Get Better Than This.
item.itunes:summary:
Girls' Frontline 2: EXILIUM's limited time event Aphelion is here! Check it out today and claim a bunch of free rewards: https://sunborn.onelink.me/fxKG/pc81Gigguk #GirlsFrontline2Exilium #gfl2exilium
Follow Girls' Frontline 2: EXILIUM on their socials for all the latest updates: - Official Site: https://gf2exilium.sunborngame.com/ - X (Twitter): https://x.com/GFL2EXILIUM_EN - Discord: https://discord.com/invite/gfl2 - Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/GirlsFrontline2ExiliumEn - YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@GFL2EXILIUM
Today, we're talking about a show I think could become a modern classic. Orb: On the Movements of the Earth
Edited by: Abhi https://twitter.com/BakaShift https://www.youtube.com/@REVELHOUSE
